channel.title: Example Shirt Shop
channel.description: Simple, quality basics. Dark palettes, clean cuts, fair prices.

item.title: Midnight Crew Tee — Restocked
item.description: Our best-selling heavyweight cotton tee in midnight black. Sizes XS–3XL. $38.

item.title: Charcoal Slim Trouser — New Arrival
item.description: Slim-fit tailored trousers in charcoal grey. Italian fabric. $89.

item.title: Ink Bomber Jacket — Limited Run
item.description: A bomber in deep navy. Ribbed cuffs, clean interior. Only 100 made. $145.
